name: Multi-Agent Orchestration System
description: A pattern for building systems where multiple specialized agents collaborate under an orchestrator to solve complex tasks. Each agent handles specific responsibilities while the orchestrator coordinates their interactions and manages the overall workflow.

frameworks.name: LangChain + LangGraph
frameworks.description: LangGraph framework for building stateful, multi-actor agent systems

deployment_patterns.name: Terraform
deployment_patterns.description: Infrastructure as Code using Terraform for AWS deployment

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: Name of your project (lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens only)

parameters.name: langfuse_host
parameters.description: Langfuse server endpoint URL for observability

parameters.name: langfuse_secret_name
parameters.description: Secrets Manager secret name for Langfuse API keys

example_use_cases: KYC analysis with credit and compliance agents
Document processing with analysis and validation agents
Customer support with routing and specialist agents
author: AVA Team
